beats.text: Dad flips a burger with the concentration of a man losing something he can't name.
PFFFT. WHOOF. A blue sheet of flame stands up on its hind legs and looks at him.

beats.speaker: Doug
beats.text: I GOT IT! I GOT IT! I — I DON'T GOT IT—

end_a.text: The grill hisses and dies. Twenty-four burgers are now archaeology. Dad's eyebrows: redefined.

end_b.text: Doug fights the grill. The grill wins. Brenda is already dialing Papa John's.
